enter_city_desc: Enter a city name or coordinates in the search bar above to get current weather data. Works anywhere — from bustling cities to remote deserts.
enter_city_or_coords: Please enter a city name or coordinates (e.g., 48.46,30.73) in the search bar.
check_spelling: Please check the spelling and try again.
sea_tooltip: Real-time data from Marine API (accurate for coastal areas).
lake_tooltip: Calculated using a smart formula that accounts for air temperature, humidity, wind speed, solar radiation, and latitude.
river_tooltip: Calculated using a smart formula... Rivers are typically cooler than lakes.
geocoding_desc: Find coordinates by city name or find city name by coordinates. Powered by OpenStreetMap.
something_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
aggregates_info: Aggregates information from Open-Meteo, WeatherAPI, Visual Crossing, and Marine API to ensure the most reliable forecast.
prefer_exact: Prefer exact location? Just type something like 48.46, 30.73 (Odesa) or any other coordinates — the app will fetch weather for that exact spot.
need_coords: Need to find coordinates for a city? Or the city name for coordinates? Use
handles_both: Handles both city names and coordinates seamlessly.
water_calculated: Water temperature for lakes and rivers is calculated specifically for your location using a custom algorithm.
prefer_exact_prefix: Prefer exact location? Just type something like
prefer_exact_suffix: (Odesa) or any other coordinates — the app will fetch weather for that exact spot.
need_coords_prefix: Need to find coordinates for a city? Or the city name for coordinates? Use
network_error_check_connection: Network error. Check your connection or try again.
server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
